channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: U.S. Embassy Abuja Suspends Visa Services Over Security Concerns, Nigerians React with Fear and Suspicion
item.description: Plenty Nigerians don begin panic and dey suspect something wey no too clear after di U.S. Embassy for Abuja announce say dem go suspend visa appointments. Di embassy talk for one short message wey dem...

item.title: Artemis II Mission Concludes with Safe Return to Earth
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has successfully concluded with the safe return of its four astronauts to Earth. The crew – Christina Koch, Victor Glover, Reid Wiseman, and Jeremy Hansen of the Canadian Spa...

item.title: Tension arises as Kinangop MP interrupts Senator Methu during public function
item.description: There was a brief moment of drama in Kinangop, Nyandarua County, when Member of Parliament Kwenya Thuku interrupted Senator John Methu as he was addressing a gathering. According to witnesses, the exc...

item.title: Filipino Groups BINI and KATSEYE’s Sophia to Perform at Coachella 2026
item.description: Kapuso and Kapamilya fans, get ready to celebrate! Filipino girl groups BINI and KATSEYE, featuring artist Sophia, are set to represent the Philippines at the prestigious Coachella music festival in 2...

item.title: Iranian and U.S. officials meet in Pakistan to discuss peace and regional stability amid ongoing conflict
item.description: On April 11, 2026, Iranian officials arrived in Pakistan for crucial peace talks with the United States, aiming to ease tensions in West Asia after recent clashes between Israel and Iran. Tehran has i...

item.title: Canberra's Football Codes Launch Their 2026 Seasons
item.description: All four major football codes in Canberra have officially kicked off their 2026 seasons, with some teams getting a head start before Easter. Fans and players alike are gearing up for a competitive sea...

item.title: Court temporarily halts verification in Alberta separation petition amid First Nations challenge
item.description: An Alberta judge has temporarily halted the government's verification process for a petition that seeks to trigger a provincial referendum on Alberta leaving Canada. Justice Shaina Leonard issued her ...

item.title: Jesy Nelson Shares Heartfelt Moment with Twin Daughters Amid SMA Struggles
item.description: Jesy Nelson, 34, has shared an emotional clip of her twin daughters, Ocean and Story, as they continue their battle with spinal muscular atrophy (SMA). The singer, who revealed in January that her dau...

item.title: Democratic Party backs Middle East resolution calling for ceasefire and U.S. diplomatic engagement
item.description: The Democratic National Committee (DNC) passed a new resolution addressing the ongoing Middle East conflict, with a clear call for a ceasefire and a renewed emphasis on diplomacy. The resolution, appr...

item.title: Seinde Signature Collaborates with Sarah Baker to Launch Exclusive Perfume Tour in Nigeria
item.description: Na big move for Africa luxury scene, Seinde Signature, which be top player for niche perfumes for Nigeria, don start one serious three-city experiential tour with famous perfumer Sarah Baker. Di tour ...

item.title: Part of State House Wall to Be Removed for Nairobi River Restoration
item.description: President William Ruto has confirmed that a section of the State House Nairobi perimeter wall will be demolished as part of efforts to reclaim riparian land along River Kirichwa Kubwa. The announcemen...

item.title: Family and Mourners Grieve the Loss of Michelle Kemboi in Nakuru
item.description: In Nakuru county, Kenya, the family of Michelle Kemboi, daughter of Kenya Ports Authority (KPA) boss Captain William Ruto, was engulfed in sorrow following her tragic death in a road accident in Taita...

item.title: Nigeria Supreme Court rules receiver cannot control company's legal choice in contested $2bn debt case
item.description: The Supreme Court of Nigeria on Friday delivered a unanimous judgment restoring senior lawyers Chief Wole Olanipekun, SAN, and Dr. Muiz Banire, SAN, as counsel for Neconde Energy Limited and Nestoil L...

item.title: Volkswagen celebrates 20 years of Polo GTI in South Africa with limited Edition 20 model
item.description: Volkswagen South Africa has unveiled a special-edition Polo GTI called the Edition 20 to mark two decades since the first Polo GTI hit local roads in 2006. Limited to 400 units, this model also honour...

item.title: Madeline Cash's 'Lost Lambs' Explores Family Chaos and Suburban Unease
item.description: Madeline Cash's debut novel, 'Lost Lambs', has received praise from Lena Dunham and has been optioned for a limited series. The story centres on the Flynn family, whose members navigate personal crise...

item.title: BINI lights up Coachella with high-energy performances of 'Pantropiko,' 'Karera,' and 'Shagidi'
item.description: On April 11, 2026, BINI made a significant mark in the international music scene with their debut performance at Coachella. The Filipino girl group, known for their high-energy performances, showcased...

item.title: US-Iran Peace Talks Begin in Islamabad Amid Ceasefire
item.description: A high-stakes diplomatic mission has begun in Islamabad with the arrival of an Iranian delegation for talks with the United States. The delegation, headed by Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher...

item.title: Liberals Reflect on Marilyn Gladu's Move from Conservatives and What It Means for the Party
item.description: The addition of Marilyn Gladu, a socially conservative former Conservative MP, to the Liberal Party has raised questions among members about the future direction of the party. Gladu, who has voted in ...

item.title: Kamala Harris Considers Possible 2028 Presidential Bid
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris hinted on Friday that she is considering a run for president in 2028 during remarks at the National Action Network event in New York. When asked by the Rev. Al Shar...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II Safely Returns to Earth After Historic Lunar Flyby
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission successfully completed its return to Earth following a ten-day journey that took the four-member crew around the Moon and back. The Orion spacecraft, carrying NASA astronauts...
